payload.headline: Suez Canal Authority announces 5-7 day vessel queuing delays due to unprecedented congestion — northbound and southbound traffic halted
payload.canal_authority_statement: The Suez Canal Authority issued an advisory citing a vessel grounding at kilometer marker 151 causing a traffic backup. Estimated clearance 5-7 days.

citations.title: Suez Canal Authority announces 5-7 day vessel queuing delays
Suez Canal traffic halted as grounding causes major backup
